resolvedQuestions: Which round-1 findings are still live, fixed, or partially fixed?
Which phases and sub-phases still contradict their own completion evidence?
Which runtime fan-out/salvage/merge/convergence bugs remain beyond the two round-1 confirmed bugs?
Is the drift caused by one shared generator/backfill gap or independent manual mistakes?
What concrete remediation backlog should close comment hygiene, registry staleness, metadata drift, and forced-depth controls?

keyFindings.title: Phase 009 exists and partially fixed merge-schema loss, but its own metadata is already stale
keyFindings.recommendation: Keep remediation inside phase 009, but regenerate 009 graph metadata immediately so children 002-004 and active next child are discoverable.

keyFindings.title: Comment-hygiene violations remain live and extend beyond the six command YAML markers
keyFindings.recommendation: Expand 009/003 from command YAML cleanup to a repo-scoped comment-hygiene lint with allowlists for test fixture data.

keyFindings.title: Salvage still writes non-padded iteration filenames, preserving the duplicate/placeholder collision class
keyFindings.recommendation: Implement 009/003 T004-T006 before broad registry replay; otherwise replay may consume ambiguous iteration files again.

keyFindings.title: Lineage timeout override remains unimplemented despite forced-depth requirements
keyFindings.recommendation: Implement 009/002 with a default-preserving `--lineage-timeout-hours` flag and regression tests before another slow high-effort fan-out.

keyFindings.title: Review registries are stale-active after fixes; no adjudication ledger exists
keyFindings.recommendation: Add a 009 child or 009/006 scope item that replays every active review finding and emits `resolved`, `still_active`, or `accepted_risk` with source evidence.

keyFindings.title: Phase maps and completion_pct drift share a never-synced-after-completion root cause
keyFindings.recommendation: Implement 009/004 as script-first, idempotent backfill, then promote the same checks into strict semantic validation.

keyFindings.title: Stop-policy=max-iterations is internally used but not first-class in research command docs
keyFindings.recommendation: Add `--stop-policy=max-iterations` to research command parsing/docs and add a contract test that convergence cannot stop before max iterations.

keyFindings.title: Detached lineage prompts still blur command-host and LEAF-agent responsibilities
keyFindings.recommendation: Change generated detached prompts to identify as a command-host lineage executor, not as the LEAF agent, or dispatch through the command surface directly.

keyFindings.title: Prompt-only write isolation remains a safety weakness for detached OpenCode lineages
keyFindings.recommendation: Add path-scoped sandbox enforcement where available, or make unsafe detached write fallback explicit and fatal-by-default for review/research fan-out.

keyFindings.title: Metadata descriptions are still truncated and old packet identity remains live
keyFindings.recommendation: Include description/trigger regeneration and old-id cleanup in 009/005 or 009/006, not as manual one-off edits.

keyFindings.title: ADR/checklist governance artifacts are missing or partial under Complete workflow phases
keyFindings.recommendation: Make 009/007 add or explicitly waive decision-record/checklist artifacts for ADR-titled and Level 2/3 Complete children.

keyFindings.title: Template-default tasks remain under Complete-status folders
keyFindings.recommendation: Add strict `SCAFFOLD_COMPLETION_DRIFT` detection before allowing packet completion claims.

ruledOutDirections: Do not report merge-schema alias loss as still live; current fanout-merge normalizes findings -> keyFindings.
Do not report Codex registry as empty; the current registry has open findings but they are stale-active.
Do not create a competing top-level phase; phase 009 already owns this backlog and expects generation-2 reconciliation.
Do not rely on archived generation-1 logs as evidence for generation-2 findings.
